title: Homestead Quarter
description: A dense cluster of sleeping pods and industrial workshops.

title: Logistics Sector
description: The operational heart of the colony, leading to the deep mines.

title: Jungle Ruins
description: Bioluminescent jungle reclaiming ancient Aethel stone ruins.

title: Sector 9 Ruins
description: The ancient Aethel facility buried beneath the jungle.

title: Lower City
description: A neon-lit foundation of vertical slums under constant rain and surveillance.

title: Upper City
description: A sterile cloud district of white marble, gold glass, false sunlight, and silent Dominion wealth.

title: Slag Pits
description: Sector 7, a geothermal war factory built into volcanic glass and rivers of slag.

title: Assembly Line
description: The Foundry interior: conveyor belts, conditioning rooms, relic forges, and the volcano core that powers Dominion war machines.

title: Dominion Orbital Ring
description: A sterile halo of executive luxury, compliance checkpoints, and machinery suspended above the planet.

title: Deep Ring
description: The frozen core of the Orbital Ring: firewall labyrinths, the Anchor Chamber, Vale's throne, and the breach beyond reality.

title: Event Horizon
description: A fractured realm where perception replaces physics.

title: The Singularity
description: The final ascent through a spiral of memory toward the center of the Source.
